remaining_midi_b_blockers: Download the full TCIA DICOM collection from the .tcia manifests using the NBIA/TCIA Data Retriever CLI or equivalent approved TCIA workflow.
Complete the TCIA/Faspex answer-key package download with an authenticated bearer-token flow and hash the SQLite answer-key database.
Run the CBIIT MIDI_validation_script against the actual candidate output, DICOM corpus, answer key, and mappings.
